name: add_error_handling
avoid: do not leak stack traces in production
brief_template:
To add consistent error handling:
1. Define custom error classes/types (ValidationError, NotFoundError, AuthError)
2. Create error middleware/handler at app level
3. Map errors to HTTP status codes (400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 500)
4. Return consistent error JSON: { error: { code, message, details } }
5. Log full error stack + context (user ID, request ID)
6. In production: hide stack traces from client responses
7. Add alerting for 500-level errors (Sentry, Rollbar, etc.)
